pr-evidence/benchmark-plan-native-factor.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 requested canonical-path dedupe for generated and explicit native factory diagnostics sidecars. The helper now dedupes with _canonical_artifact_path and a regression test covers equivalent paths; re-review approved.
verification: poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
poetry run pytest tests/test_benchmark_plan.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q (102 passed)
what_changed: Added benchmark-plan generation for native-probe factory diagnostics via --native-probe-factories-output-json.
Automatically includes generated native-probe factory diagnostics in release-bundle commands and plan records, deduped by canonical artifact path with explicit sidecars.
Updated README examples and benchmark-plan tests for command ordering, CLI wiring, path collision checks, and equivalent-path dedupe.
pr-evidence/benchmark-plan-native-factor.why: Release handoff plans should generate the package-owned vLLM/SGLang native factory diagnostics sidecar instead of requiring users to run it manually before bundling.
